source_pr.title: *: fix data races detected by go test -race

symptoms: *: fix data races detected by go test -race
failure_signature: *: fix data races detected by go test -race
root_cause_explanation: The test suite was flaky under the race detector because shared state was accessed without proper synchronization (e.g., reading the server's client map without holding the RWMutex, iterator Close paths without locking). This PR stabilizes it by adding appropriate locking and moving shared initialization to avoid concurrent mutations.
fix_pattern: Protect shared mutable state (maps/counters/iterators) with proper mutex/RWMutex locking to eliminate -race data races.

evidence: evidence: *: fix data races detected by go test -race
files: infoschema/infoschema.go, perfschema/init.go, server/server.go, server/tidb_test.go, session_test.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go, tidb_test.go
